title: bistorta × rhaetica
intro: Bistorta × rhaetica, also known as alpine bistort or alpine Polygonum, is a hybrid plant species in the buckwheat family Polygonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of bistorta × rhaetica include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation in the body. Bistorta × rhaetica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used in salves and creams to topical application.
